title: The Shadow in the Force
content: Inside, you find bank statements and property records belonging to Inspector Miller — the lead officer who ruled Vane's death a suicide.||It's time to find out why he was in such a hurry to close the case.||⚠️ ACTIONS: 2

choices.text: 🔍 Track the source of Miller's payments.
🕵️ Follow Miller to a meeting in Camden.
📁 Check the original crime scene inventory.
